description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Start a new US trademark application for a word mark in the clothing category and choose the lowest-priced package that includes both a comprehensive search and trademark filing for a single class, then continue to the application details page.

tasks.instruction: Set up a trademark search for a mark, selecting a package that covers both US federal and EU searches with a total price below $300, and proceed to the checkout summary without completing payment.

tasks.instruction: Begin a new utility patent application for an invention and, among the available provisional and non-provisional options, select the lowest-priced provisional filing whose service fee is under $800, then save the application as a draft and view its summary.

expected_values.shortDescription: A water bottle that tracks hydration levels and reminds the user when to drink.

tasks.instruction: Configure monitoring for two trademarks in the United States and choose a 12-month US-only plan that supports at least two marks, costs less than $40 per month, and uses monthly billing, then continue to the order review page.

tasks.instruction: From your trademarks dashboard, filter to registrations expiring within the next 12 months and, for one of them, select the standard (non-expedited) renewal option whose total cost is under $600 if available, otherwise the lowest-priced expedited option, enter a contact phone number, and move to the payment summary.

tasks.instruction: Book a 30-minute video patent consultation during a weekday in the third week of July 2026 by choosing the first available time slot that starts between 10:00 am and 12:00 pm local time, enter your contact details, and proceed to the booking summary.

tasks.instruction: Create a bundled order by adding a non-basic trademark package for one mark that includes both filing and monitoring with a service fee under $700, then add the lowest-priced provisional utility patent filing whose addition keeps the combined service fees for both services under $1,200, and finally open the cart.

tasks.instruction: Search for patents related to a wireless charging pad, filter results to filings from 2021 onward, sort by highest citation count, open the top result, and add it to your default patents watchlist.

target_names: Wireless charging pad with active cooling channels

patent.title: Wireless charging pad with active cooling channels

tasks.instruction: From your account dashboard, create draft applications for two trademarks—one word mark and one logo/design mark in the cosmetics and skincare category—and one design patent for a desk organizer–type product, then navigate to the page listing all draft applications.
